name: The Witness
description: The Witness is an open-world puzzle game with dozens of locations to explore and over 500 puzzles.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Puzzle Randomization
options.description: Puzzles in this randomizer are randomly generated.

options.label: Shuffle Symbols
options.description: If on, you will need to unlock puzzle symbols as items to be able to solve the panels that contain those symbols.

options.label: Shuffle Doors
options.description: If on, opening doors, moving bridges etc.

options.label: Door Groupings
options.description: Controls how door items are grouped.

options.label: Shuffle Boat
options.description: If on, adds a "Boat" item to the item pool.

options.label: Shuffle Lasers
options.description: If on, the 11 lasers are turned into items and will activate on their own upon receiving them.

options.label: Disable Non Randomized Puzzles
options.description: Disables puzzles that cannot be randomized.

options.label: Shuffle Discarded Panels
options.description: Adds Discarded Panels into the location pool.

options.label: Shuffle Vault Boxes
options.description: Adds Vault Boxes to the location pool.

options.label: Obelisk Keys
options.description: Add one Obelisk Key item per Obelisk, locking you out of solving any of the associated Environmental Puzzles.

options.label: Unlockable Warps
options.description: Adds unlockable fast travel points to the game.

options.label: Shuffle Eps
options.description: Adds Environmental/Obelisk Puzzles into the location pool.

options.label: Ep Difficulty
options.description: When "Shuffle Environmental Puzzles" is on, this setting governs which EPs are eligible for the location pool.

options.label: Shuffle Postgame
options.description: Adds locations into the pool that are guaranteed to become accessible after or at the same time as your goal.

options.label: Victory Condition
options.description: Set the victory condition for this world.

options.label: Mountain Lasers
options.description: Sets the number of lasers required to enter the Mountain.

options.label: Challenge Lasers
options.description: Sets the number of lasers required to enter the Caves through the Mountain Bottom Floor Discard and to unlock the Challenge Timer Panel.

options.label: Panel Hunt Total
options.description: Only relevant if the Victory Condition is "Panel Hunt".

options.label: Panel Hunt Required Percentage
options.description: Only relevant if the Victory Condition is "Panel Hunt".

options.label: Panel Hunt Postgame
options.description: Only relevant if the Victory Condition is "Panel Hunt".

options.label: Panel Hunt Discourage Same Area Factor
options.description: Only relevant if the Victory Condition is "Panel Hunt".

options.label: Panel Hunt Plando
options.description: Only relevant if the Victory Condition is "Panel Hunt".

options.label: Early Caves
options.description: Adds an item that opens the Caves Shortcuts to Swamp and Mountain, allowing early access to the Caves even if you are not playing a remote Door Shuffle mode.

options.label: Elevators Come To You
options.description: In vanilla, some bridges/elevators come to you if you walk up to them when they are not currently there.

options.label: Trap Percentage
options.description: Replaces junk items with traps, at the specified rate.

options.label: Puzzle Skip Amount
options.description: Adds this many Puzzle Skips into the pool, if there is room.

options.label: Hint Amount
options.description: Adds hints to Audio Logs.

options.label: Vague Hints
options.description: Make Location Hints a bit more vague, where they only tell you about the general area the item is in.

options.label: Area Hint Percentage
options.description: There are two types of hints for The Witness.

options.label: Laser Hints
options.description: If on, lasers will tell you where their items are if you walk close to them in-game.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: If on, whenever you fail a puzzle (with some exceptions), you and everyone who is also on Death Link dies.

options.label: Death Link Amnesty
options.description: The number of panel fails to allow before sending a death through Death Link.

options.label: Shuffle Dog
options.description: Adds petting the dog statue in Town into the location pool.

options.label: Easter Egg Hunt
options.description: Adds up to 120 Easter Eggs to the game, placed by NewSoupVi, Exempt-Medic, hatkirby, Scipio, and Rever.
